name: syncro-mcp
description: Every Syncro PSA and RMM workflow in your terminal, plus a local database, offline search, and cross-entity reports no other Syncro tool has.

syncro_api_key.title: SYNCRO_API_KEY
syncro_api_key.description: Sets SYNCRO_API_KEY for the Syncro MCP server. Get a credential from https://syncromsp.com.

syncro_subdomain.title: SYNCRO_SUBDOMAIN
syncro_subdomain.description: Sets SYNCRO_SUBDOMAIN for the endpoint template variable {subdomain}.
